title: Hotrodz Mega Twister Toy Car, Transforming Vehicle with Try Me Feature, Ages 3+, Available in Blue, Yellow, Red, Green
features: TRANSFORMING DESIGN: Unique twisting mechanism allows this toy vehicle to perform incredible stunts and manoeuvres with its flexible body structure
COLOUR OPTIONS: Available in four vibrant colours - blue, yellow, red, and green, each featuring durable construction and oversized rugged wheels
INTERACTIVE FEATURES: Equipped with a 'Try Me' demonstration feature, allowing testing of the toy's functions right in the packaging
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specifically designed for children aged 3 years and above, providing safe and engaging play experiences
STURDY CONSTRUCTION: Built with robust materials featuring large, grippy wheels and a flexible centre body for enhanced durability and play value
description: Product Description Introducing the Hotrodz Mega Twister, an exciting transforming toy vehicle that brings thrilling action to playtime! Available in vibrant colours including blue, yellow, red, and green, this innovative toy car features a unique twisting mechanism that creates dynamic movement patterns. Designed for children aged 3 and above, the Mega Twister boasts large, rugged wheels and a sturdy construction that can handle intense play sessions. The vehicle's special articulated body allows it to twist and contort in amazing ways, creating unexpected movements that will captivate young minds. Each Mega Twister comes with a 'Try Me' feature so you can test its exciting capabilities right in the package. The distinctive design includes detailed body graphics and striking colour schemes that make it stand out in any toy collection. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor play, this robust toy vehicle promises hours of imaginative entertainment for young automotive enthusiasts. Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable for children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
